name: English Cucumber and Ginger Conserve
recipeIngredient: Piece of ginger root, size of a lemon
recipeInstructions:
1. Peel and thinly slice the cucumbers. Place in a bowl and cover with sugar. Let stand for 24 hours.
2. Strain the cucumber juice into a preserving kettle, reserving the cucumber slices. Add any remaining sugar to the kettle and simmer gently until dissolved.
3. Tie the ginger root into a cheesecloth bag and bruise it slightly.
4. Add the ginger bag to the syrup in the kettle. Bring to a boil and continue cooking for 45 minutes.
5. Add the reserved cucumber slices to the mixture and boil for an additional 10 minutes.
6. Allow the mixture to stand, covered, for 12 hours.
7. Remove from heat and bring to a hard boil for 15 minutes. Discard the ginger bag.
8. Ladle the conserve into hot, sterilized jars and seal immediately. Makes approximately 12 half-pints of delicious crunchy conserve.
